name: Heading
description: Semantic h1-h6 heading with Lumeo typographic scale.

api.name: Heading
api.description: Semantic h1-h6 heading with Lumeo typographic scale.

parameters.name: As
parameters.description: Render the heading's visual styling on this element tag instead of the semantic h{Level} (e.g. "p", "div", "span") — the asChild-style escape hatch for "looks like a heading, isn't one in the document outline". Visual only; supply role/aria-level via attributes for heading semantics. Null = the normal h{Level}. (#295)

examples.title: All Levels
examples.code:
<Heading Level="1">Heading Level 1</Heading>
<Heading Level="2">Heading Level 2</Heading>
<Heading Level="3">Heading Level 3</Heading>
<Heading Level="4">Heading Level 4</Heading>
<Heading Level="5">Heading Level 5</Heading>
<Heading Level="6">Heading Level 6</Heading>

examples.title: Custom Sizes
examples.code:
<Heading Level="2" Size="sm">h2 with small text</Heading>
<Heading Level="3" Size="3xl">h3 with 3xl text</Heading>
<Heading Level="4" Size="lg" Weight="normal">h4 with lg text, normal weight</Heading>

examples.title: Tracking
examples.code:
<Heading Level="1">Default tight tracking</Heading>
<Heading Level="1" Tracking="normal">Normal tracking</Heading>
<Heading Level="1" Tracking="wide">Wide tracking</Heading>

examples.title: Polymorphic element (As)
examples.code:
<Heading Level="1" As="span">Looks like an h1, rendered as a span</Heading>
<Heading Level="2" As="p">Heading styles on a paragraph</Heading>

mdSummary:
# Heading

Semantic h1-h6 heading with Lumeo typographic scale.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Typography
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/heading

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Heading | Level | `int` | `2` |  |
| Heading | As | `string?` | `` | Render the heading's visual styling on this element tag instead of the semantic h{Level} (e.g. "p", "div", "span") — the asChild-style escape hatch for "looks like a heading, isn't one in the document outline". Visual only; supply role/aria-level via attributes for heading semantics. Null = the normal h{Level}. (#295) |
| Heading | Size | `string?` | `` |  |
| Heading | Weight | `string?` | `` |  |
| Heading | Tracking | `string?` | `` |  |
| Heading | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Heading | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Heading | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Heading) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Heading />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Heading/Heading.razor`
